examples: The man, who police believe is psychotic, is thought to be responsible for eight attacks.
Meprobamate and benactyzine are helpful in the treatment of neurotic psychotic depression.
The psychotic attempted to fire the hospital.
Defense attorneys point to Yates' troubling history with postpartum depression, suicide attempts and psychotic behavior.
Everyone agrees he was schizophrenic and actively psychotic, in and out of mental hospitals.
